items.summary: status=completed | Implemented DinoBrain OS v2 P0 improvements from the review report: honest lexical fallback retrieval mode, optional dense vector cosine retrieval, stopword/high-frequency token filtering, verified os_gate context evidence, sensitive prompt auto-escalation, event-backed memory audit artifact verification, SQLite/wiki index version bumps, v2.0.2 version bump, docs, and regression coverage.

items.title: Task: Assess whether DinoBrain's current architecture can become or already is a compounding knowledge
items.summary: status=completed | project=dinobrain | Assessed DinoBrain as a potential compounding knowledge OS. Conclusion: the architecture has the right foundation for compounding user-specific knowledge, but sustained use alone does not guarantee compounding. It needs enforced live pre-response hooks, reliable session distillation, reviewed promotion into accepted behavior/wiki/source records, retrieval quality, behavior evalu
